title: Assistant Manager - Office/Retail Building Engineer (Up to $7000) #NKA
description:
Location: Tanjong Pagar

Duration: 12 months contract

Working Hours: Mon - Fri, 9 - 6

Salary: Up to $7000

Job Responsibilities:

  • Plan, execute, monitor and supervise the maintenance and operation of M&E systems, building services assigned. Ensure proper operation of the systems & equipment and compliance with industry code of practices and government regulations.
  • Work with contracts & procurement team in the procurement/renewal of maintenance contracts for the M&E systems. Ensure appointed vendors perform the routine maintenance and required repair works in accordance to the scope of works and requirements.
  • Prepare scope of works and requirements, conducts invitation for tenders/ request for proposals, for planned capex works and required adhoc repair works. Plan and execute approved capex and adhoc repair works till completion.
  • Carry out defect management/ rectification, testing and commissioning with relevant stakeholders and contractors.
  • Prepare annual budgets for operating expenditures and capital expenditures for improvement works.
  • Supervise and manage engineering term contractors (Technicians, ACMV, Electrical, ELVS, P&S, Lifts & escalators, BMUs, etc.). To ensure that all term contractors deliver the contractual level of service standard.
  • Supervise Engineering Executives and a group of technicians.
  • Provide technical inputs to Leasing and FM Manager on tenants fit-out works and operation requirements.
  • Collate data (e.g. breakdown/ downtime) on M&E equipment, analyse the performance of the equipment and provide proposal on appropriate resolutions/improvement works to prolong lifespan of the equipment.
  • Implement and manage energy, water efficiency and relevant sustainability measures.
  • Continuously provide input on good practices and design guidelines for future new developments.
  • Ensure timely renewal of government licences, eg. Lifts’ permit to operate, EMA licensing, structural inspection etc.
  • Attend to requests/feedback from tenants, customers and any other duties assigned


Job Requirements:

  • Degree or Diploma in Mechanical and/or Electrical Engineering with at least 5 years (degree holder) or 8 years (diploma holder) of building management, maintenance and operation of M&E systems and equipment work experience in real estate or related industries.
  • With at least 5 years of supervisory experience;
  • Familiar with the building industry and maintenance standards such as the Singapore code of practices, Singapore Standards, Green Mark requirements.
  • Candidates with experience working with building owners and grade A commercial development or retail mall preferred.
  • Candidates with Senior Fire Safety Manager certification will be an advantage.


Ally
The Outsourcing Team
Recruit Express Pte Ltd
EA: 99C4599

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
